creator: decke@FreeBSD.org
text:
The update looks good to me and I have also compared it to an previous
update that you send for 2.0.02. I propose to commit that update to
dns/maradns because maradns2 should be quite mature already - is that
okay for you?. It seems you do care about maradns much more than I do
these days so would you like to take over maintainership for the
maradns port?

-- 
Bernhard Froehlich
http://www.bluelife.at/
